note: Based on OSRS Wiki data. Game updates may add new content at any time.

combat.name: Barbarian Assault
combat.description: A team of five fights waves of penance creatures and the penance queen.

combat.name: Bounty Hunter
combat.description: Fight other players assigned to you in the Wilderness.

combat.name: Castle Wars
combat.description: A competitive game of Capture the Flag between two teams.

combat.name: Clan Wars
combat.description: Members of two opposing Friends Chats engage in PvP combat.

combat.name: Emir's Arena
combat.description: Players duel each other with the ability to set special rules.

combat.name: Fortis Colosseum
combat.description: Players battle gladiators and creatures to prove their worth to Sol Heredit.

combat.name: Inferno
combat.description: Players battle an onslaught of enemies, making their way to defeat TzKal-Zuk.

combat.name: Intelligence Gathering
combat.description: Players locate and raid gang meetings across Great Kourend for intelligence.

combat.name: Last Man Standing
combat.description: Players fight for survival on an island using only resources found there.

combat.name: Mage Arena
combat.description: Battle Kolodion for the right to learn God spells.

combat.name: Nightmare Zone
combat.description: Partake in dreams to fight bosses previously defeated in quests.

combat.name: Pest Control
combat.description: A team combat minigame involving protecting a Void Knight while fending off waves of monsters.

combat.name: Soul Wars
combat.description: Two teams compete to gather soul fragments and defeat each other's Avatars.

combat.name: Temple Trekking / Burgh de Rott Ramble
combat.description: Guide recruits or refugees between Paterdomus and Burgh de Rott.

combat.name: TzHaar Fight Cave
combat.description: Players fight alone against waves of TzHaar monsters, culminating in TzTok-Jad.

combat.name: TzHaar Fight Pit
combat.description: Free-for-all PvP combat in a safe pit; last player standing wins.

combat.name: TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges
combat.description: Players face increasingly brutal challenges against multiple JalTok-Jads.

skilling.name: Archery Competition
skilling.description: Earn Archery tickets and Ranged XP shooting at a target at the Ranging Guild.

skilling.name: Blast Furnace
skilling.description: Players work together to keep a furnace running that halves coal needed for smelting.

skilling.name: Brimhaven Agility Arena
skilling.description: A medium-level Agility course where pillars dispense tickets for rewards.

skilling.name: Fishing Trawler
skilling.description: Players work together to keep a boat afloat while catching fish.

skilling.name: Giants' Foundry
skilling.description: Players use their own metal to create weapons for giants.

skilling.name: Gnome Ball
skilling.description: Players try to pass and charge with a ball towards a hoop to score while gnomes tackle them.

skilling.name: Gnome Restaurant
skilling.description: Players deliver food to gnome customers within a time limit.

skilling.name: Guardians of the Rift
skilling.description: Assist The Great Guardian in closing a rift into the Abyss by supplying imbued essence.

skilling.name: Hallowed Sepulchre
skilling.description: Overcome agility obstacles while looting coffins for Hallowed marks.

skilling.name: Impetuous Impulses
skilling.description: Hunt and trap implings in magical jars for various rewards.

skilling.name: Mage Training Arena
skilling.description: Four sub-minigames earning pizazz points for spells and items like infinity robes.

skilling.name: Mahogany Homes
skilling.description: Take on tasks to repair and build furniture for clients around Gielinor.

skilling.name: Mastering Mixology
skilling.description: Refine herbs into basic elements to brew potions for order.

skilling.name: Mess
skilling.description: Cook food to serve to soldiers of Shayzien.

skilling.name: Pyramid Plunder
skilling.description: Advance through 8 rooms avoiding traps and looting treasure within a time limit.

skilling.name: Rogues' Den
skilling.description: Navigate a tricky maze filled with traps and obstacles for rogue equipment.

skilling.name: Sorceress's Garden
skilling.description: Sneak around watchful elementals to pick Sq'irk fruits or herbs.

skilling.name: Stealing Artefacts
skilling.description: Retrieve items for Captain Khaled while avoiding guards.

skilling.name: Tithe Farm
skilling.description: Intensively plant, tend, and harvest special seeds to earn points.

skilling.name: Trouble Brewing
skilling.description: Two teams compete to brew the most bottles of 'rum'.

skilling.name: Vale Totems
skilling.description: Earn vale offerings and research points by building, carving, and decorating totems.

skilling.name: Volcanic Mine
skilling.description: Mine as many ore fragments as possible before the volcano erupts.

combat_and_skilling.name: Shades of Mort'ton
combat_and_skilling.description: Build up a temple, defend it from shades, and venture into catacombs for rewards.

combat_and_skilling.name: Tai Bwo Wannai Cleanup
combat_and_skilling.description: Help clean up the village of Tai Bwo Wannai while encountering monsters.

combat_and_skilling.name: The Gauntlet
combat_and_skilling.description: Enter a dungeon without equipment and gather resources to survive a fight against the Crystalline Hunllef.

combat_and_skilling.name: Warriors' Guild
combat_and_skilling.description: Various minigames to train melee and earn warrior guild tokens for defenders.

miscellaneous.name: Burthorpe Games Room
miscellaneous.description: Compete in various board games. Also available at the Games Zone.

miscellaneous.name: Forestry
miscellaneous.description: Earn anima-infused bark by participating in randomly spawned forestry events while Woodcutting.

miscellaneous.name: Rat Pits
miscellaneous.description: Train cats to become wily cats in arenas of battle between cats and mice.

miscellaneous.name: Tears of Guthix
miscellaneous.description: Collect tears of Guthix in a sacred cave for XP in your lowest skill. Once per week.

bosses.name: Barrows
bosses.description: Defeat the six Barrows brothers' phantoms and loot valuable equipment from the crypts.

bosses.name: Moons of Peril
bosses.description: Help Eyatlalli distract the three Moons of Peril for rewards.

bosses.name: Zalcano
bosses.description: Use skilling to defeat an ancient Zamorakian general cursed to turn into stone.

bosses.name: Wintertodt
bosses.description: Help the Order of the Sacred Flame subdue an ancient storm of perpetual winter.

bosses.name: Tempoross
bosses.description: Help the Spirit Anglers subdue an ancient spirit of the sea causing severe storms.

other_activities.name: Blast Mine
other_activities.description: Use dynamite to mine for ores, allowing high-level ores at lower levels.

other_activities.name: Camdozaal Vault
other_activities.description: Navigate the vault to find lockboxes of increasing value.

other_activities.name: Chompy Bird Hunting
other_activities.description: Lure and kill chompies for cosmetic chompy bird hats.

other_activities.name: Creature Creation
other_activities.description: Animate monsters that drop Herblore secondary ingredients, raw foods, and feathers.

other_activities.name: Dorgesh-Kaan Market Trading
other_activities.description: Sell exotic surface food to Dorgeshuun gourmets for coins.

other_activities.name: Keldagrim Tasks
other_activities.description: Complete tasks assigned by dwarves for coins.

other_activities.name: Managing Miscellania
other_activities.description: Manage labourers on the islands of Miscellania and Etceteria for passive rewards.

other_activities.name: Shayzien Combat Ring
other_activities.description: Challenge soldiers of Shayzien in melee matches for Shayzien armour.

other_activities.name: Sled Racing
other_activities.description: Ride a sled down an icy timed course in Scrubfoot's cave.

other_activities.name: Stealing Valuables
other_activities.description: Pickpocket wealthy citizens for house keys to burgle their houses.

other_activities.name: Underwater Agility and Thieving
other_activities.description: Navigate underwater obstacles for Mermaid's tears and Glistening tears.

other_activities.name: Werewolf Skullball
other_activities.description: Kick a human skull through goals to earn Agility XP.

other_activities.name: Wise Old Man Tasks
other_activities.description: Complete tasks from the Wise Old Man for Prayer XP or items.

raids.name: Chambers of Xeric
raids.description: Large cave system underneath Mount Quidamortem. Scales to 1-100 players.

raids.name: Theatre of Blood
raids.description: A linear raid in Morytania with five boss encounters.

raids.name: Tombs of Amascut
raids.description: A raid in the Kharidian Desert with adjustable difficulty via invocations.

distractions_and_diversions.name: Champions' Challenge
distractions_and_diversions.description: Defeat champion NPCs using specific combat restrictions.

distractions_and_diversions.name: Shooting Stars
distractions_and_diversions.description: Mine fallen stars that crash around Gielinor for Mining XP and rewards.

distractions_and_diversions.name: Treasure Trails
distractions_and_diversions.description: Complete clue scrolls of various difficulties for unique rewards.

world_bosses.name: Corporeal Beast
world_bosses.location: Wilderness (cave east of Graveyard of Shadows)

quest_and_other_bosses.name: Sol Heredit
quest_and_other_bosses.note: Final boss of the Fortis Colosseum minigame
